name: Habitify
description: Multi-platform habit tracker with analytics, mood tracking, Apple Health/Google Fit sync, social challenges. 2M+ users. App of the Day by Apple.

web.headline: Build Better Habits, Build a Better Life
web.subheadline: Harness the power of our personalized habit tracker app to streamline your everyday routines and achieve your goals.

top_praise: Habit tracking effectiveness — keeps users motivated and accountable
Cross-platform (iOS, Android, macOS, Web, Apple Watch)
Integration richness — Apple Health, Zapier, Google Fit
top_complaints: Aggressive paywall — 3-habit cap on free tier pushes early monetization
UX friction — annoying confirmation prompts, excessive notifications
Technical bugs — widget sync failures, data inconsistencies
Confusing interface — steep learning curve for new users
Notification overload — cannot disable push notifications per habit
one_star_issues: 3 habit limit on free tier feels like a bait-and-switch
Lost Apple Health integration in one update
sentiment.positioning: Data-driven habit tracker for analytics lovers. Best-in-class integrations. Weak free tier limits growth.
